hero.name: Satyam Kumar
roles: Building Scalable Web & AI Agentic Systems
hero.bio: Software Engineer building scalable full-stack and AI-powered applications using FastAPI, LangChain, ChromaDB, PostgreSQL, React, MERN stack, and REST APIs with a focus on production-grade system design.

about.title: About Me
about.description1: Software Engineer with 1+ year of experience building and shipping AI-powered products and full-stack applications in production. At Xornor Technologies, I engineer LLM-driven workflows, REST APIs, and scalable backend services — from an AI-powered Jira analytics platform to KAI-LMS, a production Learning Management System with rubric-based AI grading.
about.description2: Earlier at Innova Solutions, delivered production-grade data pipelines and BI reporting for Centene — a Fortune 25 US healthcare client — processing Medicaid and Medicare claim data at enterprise scale.
about.description3: Core stack: Python · React · Node.js · FastAPI · LangChain · RAG Apps · Fine Tuning · PostgreSQL · AWS.
about.description4: Seeking a Software Engineer or AI Engineer role where I can build intelligent, scalable systems from the ground up.

experience.title: Software Engineer & AI Agents Engineer
experience.description: Building enterprise-scale AI-powered web applications, automation systems, and data-driven platforms across full-stack development, backend architecture, AI integration, and workflow automation.

projects.name: AI-Powered Jira Analytics Platform
projects.detail: Built and deployed end-to-end — Jira REST API ingestion, LangChain + OpenAI pipeline for worklog classification and anomaly detection, and a React dashboard surfacing productivity and utilisation insights to engineering managers across 50+ projects.

projects.name: Idempotent ETL & Data Synchronization Pipelines
projects.detail: Delivered within a 2-week sprint — architected cron-scheduled ETL pipelines for continuous Jira data synchronization, implemented deduplication and schema validation layers ensuring zero data loss across daily ingestion cycles, and eliminated 90% of manual reporting overhead.

projects.name: KAI-LMS — AI-Powered Learning Management System
projects.detail: Built a production multi-role LMS with an AI-driven rubric-based grading module; the LLM evaluation layer assesses open-ended student responses against structured rubric criteria, providing consistent detailed feedback at scale and cutting instructor review time by an estimated 10×.

projects.name: KAI-LMS Platform Extension (Ongoing)
projects.detail: Extending KAI-LMS as part of a 4-engineer team — engineering a real-time in-app messaging system, integrating LLM-based automated evaluation for assignments and quizzes, and resolving production bugs across the platform to improve system stability and user experience.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.description: Delivered production-grade data pipelines and BI reporting solutions for Centene (Fortune 25 US healthcare client), processing Medicaid and Medicare claim data at enterprise scale.

projects.name: 1,800+ Files Data Consolidation Pipeline
projects.detail: Built an automated Power Query (M-Code) pipeline to ingest, normalise, and consolidate 1,800+ monthly CSV files across 60+ heterogeneous report schemas into a single unified analytics dataset, eliminating all manual report merging and enabling consistent month-over-month analytics at scale.

projects.name: End-to-End Claims Reporting Workflow
projects.detail: Replaced legacy SAS extraction with optimised Oracle SQL queries and built a full workflow — Oracle DB → Power Automate → SharePoint → Power BI — enabling daily and monthly refresh dashboards tracking Medicaid and Medicare insurance claim errors across public and private payers.

projects.name: Healthcare Error Analytics Dataset
projects.detail: Engineered a derived analytics dataset with computed columns — Key ID, Entry Date, Claim Age, and SLA metrics — enabling compliance trend visualisation and SLA breach tracking across monthly reporting cycles for a client processing millions of healthcare claims annually.

projects.name: Power BI Dashboards & Workflow Automation
projects.detail: Designed interactive Power BI dashboards for KPI tracking, claim error monitoring, and operational reporting; built supporting Power Automate workflows for alerts, scheduled refresh notifications, and data quality mismatch reporting, significantly reducing manual effort.

projects.name: Cloud & Enterprise Data Tools
projects.detail: Applied Snowflake (warehouse tuning, streams, tasks, time travel) and Informatica IICS (parameterized ETL mappings) in practical data integration tasks; additionally explored dbt transformation layers and Databricks for large-scale structured data processing.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Builder with fast learning and problem-solving mindset
experience.description: Built modern full-stack applications focused on scalable backend systems, responsive frontend experiences, AI integrations, and solving real-world problems through college and self-driven projects.

projects.name: OneAI
projects.detail: OneAI is a research-focused Personal AI Operating System designed to explore long-term memory, memoization, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and scalable AI architectures inspired by modern data platforms such as Snowflake, providing a foundation for intelligent agents, knowledge management, and personalized AI workflows and it also combines LLM-powered chat, web search, and tool execution in a unified platform, built with FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL, Redis, and OpenRouter for future memory and agent-based workflows.

projects.name: Portfolio Website with AI Chatbot
projects.detail: Built a portfolio chatbot with a RAG pipeline — stored portfolio data in ChromaDB, retrieved relevant chunks on each query, and passed them as context to the LLM for source-grounded answers, cuts prompt size compared to sending full data on every call. Deployed full-stack with React frontend and Node.js/Express backend; handles real-time queries with  conversational follow-up support.

projects.name: NewsBucket
projects.detail: Built an AI-powered news platform using React.js and FastAPI with LLM integration for intelligent news interaction, smart assistance, and enhanced user engagement.

projects.name: QuantFit
projects.detail: Developed an online fitness tracker platform with workout management, progress tracking, and user-focused health features.

projects.name: PulsePoint News
projects.detail: Developed a modern news website using the MERN stack with features such as article management, category-based browsing, responsive UI, and backend API integration.

projects.name: Skill-Link
projects.detail: Built a job-connect platform for village workers using Node.js, Express.js, EJS, JavaScript, and MongoDB with search by zip code and service type.

projects.name: Twitter Clone
projects.detail: Created a social media platform inspired by Twitter using the MERN stack with features like authentication, posting updates, likes, comments, and user profiles.

education.title: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.description: Graduated with 9.54 CPGA without any backlog in any of the semesters. Coursework focused on Data Structures, Algorithms, Web Development, and Database Management.

education.title: Trident Public School
education.description: Completed secondary education with a focus on PCM (Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics) with 81% marks.

education.title: City Central High School
education.description: Completed secondary education with a focus on subjects like science, social science, english, hindi and mathematics with overall 83.4% marks and highest marks in mathematics was 95%.

certifications.title: Global Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Pathway

projects.name: Portfolio Website with AI Chatbot
projects.description: A modern portfolio website built with React and Tailwind CSS featuring an AI chatbot that dynamically answers questions about skills, projects, and experience.

additional_info.title: Professional Interests
additional_info.content: Satyam is deeply interested in Artificial Intelligence, Large Language Models (LLMs), Data Engineering, Cloud Systems, and Full Stack Development. He enjoys building products that combine intelligent automation with practical real-world use cases.

additional_info.title: Learning Mindset
additional_info.content: He is highly curious about emerging technologies and continuously upgrades his skills through hands-on projects, certifications, experimentation, and self-learning. He adapts quickly to new tools, frameworks, and evolving industry trends.

additional_info.title: Problem Solving Philosophy
additional_info.content: Satyam believes in learning by building. His approach focuses on creating clean, scalable, and impactful solutions rather than only studying theory. He values consistency, ownership, and practical execution.

additional_info.title: Career Motivation
additional_info.content: He is motivated to work in environments where he can solve meaningful problems, contribute to strong engineering teams, and grow across software, data, and AI domains.

additional_info.title: Location Background
additional_info.content: Originally from Bihar, Satyam has professional work exposure in Hyderabad and is currently living in Mohali, India.

additional_info.title: Work Style
additional_info.content: He is known for being focused, disciplined, and determined when working on technical goals. Once committed to a task, he prefers finishing it with quality and ownership.

additional_info.title: Personal Life
additional_info.content: Satyam is basically a mumma boy and loves spending time with his family. His father is a farmer and mother is a homemaker. He has a younger brother who is currently pursuing his studies in agriculture. He values family time and enjoys connecting with loved ones.

additional_info.title: Hobbies & Interests
additional_info.content: Satyam enjoys exploring new technologies, building side projects, reading tech blogs, and staying updated with AI advancements. He also likes outdoor activities, sports like cricket, table tennis, tennis, yoga, fitness, and spending quality time with friends and family.
